_comment: Per-asset band position overrides for LTG_TOOL_depth_temp_lint Section 12.
_comment2: Keys are PNG basenames (case-sensitive). Values: fg_y_frac, bg_y_frac, band_h (optional), threshold (optional).
_comment3: Assets not listed here use the default bands (FG=0.78, BG=0.70, band=50, threshold=12.0).
_comment4: Created C48 by Lee Tanaka. Calibrated against SF04/SF05 actual character positions.

LTG_COLOR_styleframe_sf04.png.label: SF04 Resolution
LTG_COLOR_styleframe_sf04.png.rationale: Luma stands at ~40-60% height; floor/BG zone at ~80-90%. Default 78/70 bands both sample below the character, producing inverted separation (-11.2). Correct bands: FG at character feet (55%), BG at floor reflections (85%). Verified PASS sep=28.6.

LTG_COLOR_styleframe_sf05.png.label: SF05 The Passing
LTG_COLOR_styleframe_sf05.png.rationale: Miri and Luma positioned at ~30-50% height above a counter surface. Cool floor reflections at 80-90%. Default 78/70 bands sample below both characters in the cool zone, producing inverted separation (-10.3). Correct bands: FG at character torso height (40%), BG at floor (85%). Verified PASS sep=116.1.
